expression: (async()=>{const meta={"fileName":"01-welcome.png","fileSize":272972,"md5":"5af2180e1c12ce01666f473f1136f5b6"};const setId="b337f126-2bc2-48eb-ad78-2428623ee2c6";const bin=atob(window.__gushaB64);const bytes=new Uint8Array(bin.length);for(let i=0;i<bin.length;i++)bytes[i]=bin.charCodeAt(i);if(bytes.length!==meta.fileSize) return JSON.stringify({fileName:meta.fileName,error:'size',got:bytes.length,expected:meta.fileSize});const reserve=await fetch('https://appstoreconnect.apple.com/iris/v1/appScreenshots',{method:'POST',credentials:'include',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({data:{type:'appScreenshots',attributes:{fileName:meta.fileName,fileSize:bytes.length},relationships:{appScreenshotSet:{data:{type:'appScreenshotSets',id:setId}}}}})});const reserveText=await reserve.text();if(!reserve.ok) return JSON.stringify({fileName:meta.fileName,step:'reserve',status:reserve.status,body:reserveText.slice(0,500)});const reserveJ=JSON.parse(reserveText);const screenshotId=reserveJ.data.id;for(const op of reserveJ.data.attributes.uploadOperations){const chunk=bytes.slice(op.offset,op.offset+op.length);const headers={};for(const h of op.requestHeaders||[])headers[h.name]=h.value;const put=await fetch(op.url,{method:op.method||'PUT',headers,body:chunk});if(!put.ok) return JSON.stringify({fileName:meta.fileName,step:'put',status:put.status});}const commit=await fetch('https://appstoreconnect.apple.com/iris/v1/appScreenshots/'+screenshotId,{method:'PATCH',credentials:'include',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({data:{type:'appScreenshots',id:screenshotId,attributes:{uploaded:true,sourceFileChecksum:meta.md5}}})});return JSON.stringify({fileName:meta.fileName,step:'done',screenshotId,commitStatus:commit.status,body:(await commit.text()).slice(0,300)});})()
